Trigger.name: g_character_tell_report_mastery_costs
Trigger.script: if GSTATS and GSTATS.handle_tell_report then GSTATS.handle_tell_report("", "mastery", matches[2], matches[3]) end

Trigger.name: g_character_tell_report_instinct_costs
Trigger.script: if GSTATS and GSTATS.handle_tell_report then GSTATS.handle_tell_report("", "instinct", matches[2], matches[3]) end

Alias.name: g_character_cmd
Alias.script: if GSTATS and GSTATS.command then GSTATS.command(matches[2] or "") end

Script.name: g_character_main
Script.script:
GSTATS = GSTATS or {}
local function gstats_persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end GSTATS.state_file = gstats_persistence_dir() .. "/g_character_state.lua" GSTATS.defaults = { x = "0%", y = "70%", width = "70%", height = "30%", fontsize = 9, visible = true, layout = "horizontal", compact = false, report_channel = "gt", } GSTATS.state = GSTATS.state or {} GSTATS.ui = GSTATS.ui or {} GSTATS.last = GSTATS.last or nil GSTATS.capture = GSTATS.capture or {}
function GSTATS.merge_defaults() if GSTATS.state.font ~= nil and GSTATS.state.fontsize == nil then GSTATS.state.fontsize = GSTATS.state.font end GSTATS.state.font = nil for k, v in pairs(GSTATS.defaults) do if GSTATS.state[k] == nil then GSTATS.state[k] = v end end end
function GSTATS.load_state() if type(table.load) == "function" then local loaded_into = {} local ok, loaded_a, loaded_b = pcall(table.load, GSTATS.state_file, loaded_into) if ok then if next(loaded_into) ~= nil then GSTATS.state = loaded_into elseif type(loaded_a) == "table" then GSTATS.state = loaded_a elseif loaded_a == true and type(loaded_b) == "table" then GSTATS.state = loaded_b end end elseif yajl and yajl.to_value then local f = io.open(GSTATS.state_file, "r") if f then local raw = f:read("*a") f:close() local ok, loaded = pcall(yajl.to_value, raw) if ok and type(loaded) == "table" then GSTATS.state = loaded end end end GSTATS.merge_defaults() end
function GSTATS.save_state() if GSTATS.ui and GSTATS.ui.container then if GSTATS.ui.container.get_x then GSTATS.state.x = GSTATS.ui.container:get_x() end if GSTATS.ui.container.get_y then GSTATS.state.y = GSTATS.ui.container:get_y() end if GSTATS.ui.container.get_width then GSTATS.state.width = GSTATS.ui.container:get_width() end if GSTATS.ui.container.get_height then GSTATS.state.height = GSTATS.ui.container:get_height() end end if type(table.save) == "function" then local ok = pcall(table.save, GSTATS.state_file, GSTATS.state) if ok then return true end end
if yajl and yajl.to_string then local ok, payload = pcall(yajl.to_string, GSTATS.state) if ok and payload then local f = io.open(GSTATS.state_file, "w") if f then f:write(payload) f:close() return true end end end return false end
function GSTATS.ensure_ui() if not Geyser then return end
if not GSTATS.ui.container then local container if Adjustable and Adjustable.Container and Adjustable.Container.new then local ok, adj = pcall(function() return Adjustable.Container:new({ name = "GSTATSContainer", x = GSTATS.state.x, y = GSTATS.state.y, width = GSTATS.state.width, height = GSTATS.state.height, adjLabelstyle = "border: 1px solid #4a4a4a; background-color: #101010;", buttonstyle = "", lockStyle = "border: 0px;", titleText = "", titleTxtColor = "white", }) end) if ok then container = adj end end
if not container then container = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "GSTATSContainer", x = GSTATS.state.x, y = GSTATS.state.y, width = GSTATS.state.width, height = GSTATS.state.height, }) if container.enableDrag then container:enableDrag() end end
GSTATS.ui.container = container GSTATS.ui.console = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "GSTATSConsole", x = 0, y = 0, width = "100%", height = "100%", }, container) GSTATS.ui.console:setColor(0, 0, 0, 120) GSTATS.ui.console:setFontSize(tonumber(GSTATS.state.fontsize) or 9) GSTATS.ui.console:setWrap(300) end
if GSTATS.state.visible then GSTATS.ui.container:show() else GSTATS.ui.container:hide() end end
function GSTATS.player_name() if gmcp and gmcp.char and gmcp.char.base and gmcp.char.base.name then return tostring(gmcp.char.base.name) end if gmcp and gmcp.char and gmcp.char.status and gmcp.char.status.name then return tostring(gmcp.char.status.name) end if gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status and gmcp.Char.Status.name then return tostring(gmcp.Char.Status.name) end if gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Name and gmcp.Char.Name.name then return tostring(gmcp.Char.Name.name) end return "Unknown" end
function GSTATS.safe_number(...) for i = 1, select("#", ...) do local v = select(i, ...) if v ~= nil then local n = tonumber(v) if n then return n end end end return 0 end
function GSTATS.format_compact_number(value) local n = GSTATS.safe_number(value) local sign = "" if n < 0 then sign = "-" n = math.abs(n) end
if n < 1000 then return string.format("%s%d", sign, n) end
local scales = { { value = 1000000000000, suffix = "t" }, { value = 1000000000, suffix = "b" }, { value = 1000000, suffix = "m" }, { value = 1000, suffix = "k" }, }
for _, scale in ipairs(scales) do if n >= scale.value then local scaled = n / scale.value local rounded = math.floor(scaled * 10 + 0.5) / 10 local text = string.format("%.1f", rounded):gsub("%.0$", "") return string.format("%s%s%s", sign, text, scale.suffix) end end
return string.format("%s%d", sign, n) end
function GSTATS.from_gmcp() local c = (gmcp and gmcp.char) or {} local s = c.status or {} local v = c.vitals or {} local m = c.maxstats or {} local b = c.base or {} local st = c.stats or {} local w = c.worth or {}
local d = {} local standing_map = { [1] = "at login screen", [2] = "logging in", [3] = "standing", [4] = "afk", [5] = "writing a note", [6] = "editing a note", [7] = "at paged output prompt", [8] = "in combat", [9] = "sleeping", [11] = "resting", [12] = "running" } local standing_num = GSTATS.safe_number(s.state, s.pos, s.position) d.standing = standing_map[standing_num] or tostring(s.state or s.pos or s.position or ""):lower() d.hp = GSTATS.safe_number(v.hp, s.hp) d.maxhp = GSTATS.safe_number(m.maxhp, v.maxhp, s.maxhp) d.mana = GSTATS.safe_number(v.mana, s.mana) d.maxmana = GSTATS.safe_number(m.maxmana, v.maxmana, s.maxmana) d.moves = GSTATS.safe_number(v.moves, s.moves) d.maxmoves = GSTATS.safe_number(m.maxmoves, v.maxmoves, s.maxmoves) d.hitroll = GSTATS.safe_number(st.hr, st.hitroll, s.hitroll, s.hit) d.damroll = GSTATS.safe_number(st.dr, st.damroll, s.damroll, s.dam) d.tnl = GSTATS.safe_number(s.tnl, b.perlevel) d.level = GSTATS.safe_number(s.level, b.level) d.align = GSTATS.safe_number(s.align) d.gold = GSTATS.safe_number(w.gold) d.qp = GSTATS.safe_number(w.qp) d.tp = GSTATS.safe_number(w.tp) d.trains = GSTATS.safe_number(w.trains) d.pracs = GSTATS.safe_number(w.pracs)
d.str = GSTATS.safe_number(st.str, s.str) d.maxstr = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxstr, m.maxstr, d.str) d.int = GSTATS.safe_number(st.int, s.int) d.maxint = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxint, m.maxint, d.int) d.wis = GSTATS.safe_number(st.wis, s.wis) d.maxwis = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxwis, m.maxwis, d.wis) d.dex = GSTATS.safe_number(st.dex, s.dex) d.maxdex = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxdex, m.maxdex, d.dex) d.con = GSTATS.safe_number(st.con, s.con) d.maxcon = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxcon, m.maxcon, d.con) d.luck = GSTATS.safe_number(st.luck, s.luck) d.maxluck = GSTATS.safe_number(st.maxluck, m.maxluck, d.luck) return d end
function GSTATS.gmcp_has_stats() if type(gmcp) ~= "table" then return false end if type(gmcp.char) ~= "table" then return false end local c = gmcp.char if type(c.vitals) == "table" and (c.vitals.hp ~= nil or c.vitals.mana ~= nil or c.vitals.moves ~= nil) then return true end if type(c.status) == "table" and (c.status.level ~= nil or c.status.state ~= nil) then return true end if type(c.worth) == "table" and (c.worth.gold ~= nil or c.worth.qp ~= nil or c.worth.tp ~= nil) then return true end return false end
function GSTATS.format_stats(data) if GSTATS.state.layout == "vertical" then return GSTATS.format_stats_vertical(data) end return GSTATS.format_stats_horizontal(data) end
function GSTATS.label(name) local compact = GSTATS.state.compact == true if not compact then return name end local labels = { Strength = "Str", Hitroll = "HR", Damroll = "DR", Luck = "Luk", Health = "Hp", Moves = "Mvs", Intelligence = "Int", Wisdom = "Wis", Dexterity = "Dex", Constitution = "Con", Mana = "Mana", Gold = "Gold", Level = "Lvl", TNL = "TNL", QP = "QP", TP = "TP", Align = "Align", Trains = "Trains", Pracs = "Pracs", } return labels[name] or name end
function GSTATS.format_value_pair(current, maximum) return string.format("%d/%d", GSTATS.safe_number(current), GSTATS.safe_number(maximum)) end
function GSTATS.format_line(label, value, width) return string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(width) .. "s : <white>%s\n", label, tostring(value)) end
function GSTATS.format_stats_vertical(data) local groups = { { { "Strength", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.str, data.maxstr) }, { "Intelligence", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.int, data.maxint) }, { "Wisdom", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.wis, data.maxwis) }, { "Dexterity", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.dex, data.maxdex) }, { "Constitution", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.con, data.maxcon) }, { "Luck", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.luck, data.maxluck) }, { "Hitroll", GSTATS.safe_number(data.hitroll) }, { "Damroll", GSTATS.safe_number(data.damroll) }, }, { { "Trains", GSTATS.safe_number(data.trains) }, { "Pracs", GSTATS.safe_number(data.pracs) }, { "Gold", GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.gold) }, { "TP", GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.tp) }, { "QP", GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.qp) }, }, { { "Level", GSTATS.safe_number(data.level) }, { "TNL", GSTATS.safe_number(data.tnl) }, { "Align", GSTATS.safe_number(data.align) }, }, { { "Health", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.hp, data.maxhp) }, { "Mana", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.mana, data.maxmana) }, { "Moves", GSTATS.format_value_pair(data.moves, data.maxmoves) }, }, }
local max_label = 0 for _, group in ipairs(groups) do for _, item in ipairs(group) do local label = GSTATS.label(item[1]) if #label > max_label then max_label = #label end end end
local out = "" for i, group in ipairs(groups) do for _, item in ipairs(group) do out = out .. GSTATS.format_line(GSTATS.label(item[1]), item[2], max_label) end if i < #groups then out = out .. "\n" end end return out end
function GSTATS.format_stats_horizontal(data) local name = GSTATS.player_name() local out = "" local l_health = GSTATS.label("Health") local l_mana = GSTATS.label("Mana") local l_moves = GSTATS.label("Moves") local l_hitroll = GSTATS.label("Hitroll") local l_damroll = GSTATS.label("Damroll") local l_strength = GSTATS.label("Strength") local l_int = GSTATS.label("Intelligence") local l_wis = GSTATS.label("Wisdom") local l_dex = GSTATS.label("Dexterity") local l_con = GSTATS.label("Constitution") local l_luck = GSTATS.label("Luck") local left_width = math.max(#l_health, #l_mana, #l_moves, #l_hitroll, #l_damroll) local right_width = math.max(#l_strength, #l_int, #l_wis, #l_dex, #l_con, #l_luck) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(left_width) .. "s : <white>%5d<cyan>/<white>%5d <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", l_health, data.hp, data.maxhp, l_strength, data.str, data.maxstr) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(left_width) .. "s : <white>%5d<cyan>/<white>%5d <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", l_mana, data.mana, data.maxmana, l_int, data.int, data.maxint) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(left_width) .. "s : <white>%5d<cyan>/<white>%5d <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", l_moves, data.moves, data.maxmoves, l_wis, data.wis, data.maxwis) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(left_width) .. "s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", l_hitroll, data.hitroll, l_dex, data.dex, data.maxdex) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-" .. tostring(left_width) .. "s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", l_damroll, data.damroll, l_con, data.con, data.maxcon) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%s <cyan>%-" .. tostring(right_width) .. "s : <white>%3d<cyan>/<white>%3d\n", string.rep(" ", left_width + 15), l_luck, data.luck, data.maxluck) out = out .. "\n" out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-7s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-12s : <green>%7d\n", GSTATS.label("TNL"), data.tnl, GSTATS.label("Level"), data.level) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-7s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-12s : <white>%7s\n", GSTATS.label("Align"), data.align, GSTATS.label("Gold"), GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.gold)) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-7s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-12s : <white>%7s\n", GSTATS.label("Trains"), data.trains, GSTATS.label("QP"), GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.qp)) out = out .. string.format("<cyan>%-7s : <white>%11d <cyan>%-12s : <white>%7s\n", GSTATS.label("Pracs"), data.pracs, GSTATS.label("TP"), GSTATS.format_compact_number(data.tp)) out = out .. "\n" out = out .. string.format("<cyan>You are : <white>%s (%s)\n", data.standing or "", name) return out end
function GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() GSTATS.ensure_ui() if GSTATS.gmcp_has_stats() then GSTATS.last = GSTATS.from_gmcp() GSTATS.state.last_stats = GSTATS.last GSTATS.save_state() elseif not GSTATS.last and type(GSTATS.state.last_stats) == "table" then GSTATS.last = GSTATS.state.last_stats end if not GSTATS.last then GSTATS.last = GSTATS.from_gmcp() end GSTATS.ui.console:clear() GSTATS.ui.console:cecho(GSTATS.format_stats(GSTATS.last)) end
function GSTATS.on_gmcp() GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end
function GSTATS.trim(s) return tostring(s or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
function GSTATS.resolve_report_channel(channel) local chosen = GSTATS.trim(channel) if chosen == "" then chosen = GSTATS.trim(GSTATS.state.report_channel or GSTATS.defaults.report_channel or "gt") end return chosen end
function GSTATS.c_label(text) return "@c" .. tostring(text or "") end
function GSTATS.c_value(text) return "@W" .. tostring(text or "") end
function GSTATS.c_high(text) return "@C" .. tostring(text or "") end
function GSTATS.report_segment(label, value, suffix) local piece = GSTATS.c_label("[") .. GSTATS.c_high(label) .. GSTATS.c_label(": ") .. GSTATS.c_value(value) if suffix and suffix ~= "" then piece = piece .. GSTATS.c_label("/") .. GSTATS.c_value(suffix) end return piece .. GSTATS.c_label("]") end
function GSTATS.format_int(n) local value = math.floor(tonumber(n) or 0) local sign = value < 0 and "-" or "" local s = tostring(math.abs(value)) local out = s:reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse() if out:sub(1, 1) == "," then out = out:sub(2) end return sign .. out end
function GSTATS.format_pct(n) return string.format("%.2f%%", tonumber(n) or 0) end
GSTATS.mastery_breakpoints = { { mastery = 0, pct = 0 }, { mastery = 16, pct = 5 }, { mastery = 37, pct = 10 }, { mastery = 65, pct = 15 }, { mastery = 104, pct = 20 }, { mastery = 163, pct = 25 }, { mastery = 260, pct = 30 }, { mastery = 455, pct = 35 }, { mastery = 1039, pct = 40 }, }
function GSTATS.mastery_pct(value) local x = tonumber(value) or 0 if x <= 0 then return 0 end local points = GSTATS.mastery_breakpoints for i = 1, #points - 1 do local a, b = points[i], points[i + 1] if x <= b.mastery then local span = b.mastery - a.mastery if span <= 0 then return a.pct end local t = (x - a.mastery) / span return a.pct + (b.pct - a.pct) * t end end return points[#points].pct end
function GSTATS.mastery_total_qp(value) local n = tonumber(value) or 0 return 10 * n * (n + 9) end
function GSTATS.mastery_total_gold(value) local n = tonumber(value) or 0 return 125000 * n * n + 1875000 * n end
function GSTATS.instinct_total_trains(value) local n = tonumber(value) or 0 return (25 * n * (n + 15)) / 2 end
function GSTATS.instinct_total_gold(value) local n = tonumber(value) or 0 return 50000 * n * n + 1950000 * n end
function GSTATS.validate_cost_range(kind, from_value, to_value) local from_n = tonumber(from_value) local to_n = tonumber(to_value) if not from_n or not to_n then return nil, "invalid range values" end if from_n < 0 or to_n < 0 then return nil, "range values must be non-negative" end if to_n <= from_n then return nil, "target must be greater than source" end local max_value = kind == "mastery" and 500 or 200 if from_n > max_value or to_n > max_value then return nil, string.format("%s range must be between 0 and %d", kind, max_value) end return from_n, to_n end
function GSTATS.report_mastery_costs(from_value, to_value, channel) local from_n, to_n_or_err = GSTATS.validate_cost_range("mastery", from_value, to_value) if not from_n then cecho(string.format("<tomato>gstats: %s\n", tostring(to_n_or_err))) return end local to_n = to_n_or_err local qp = GSTATS.mastery_total_qp(to_n) - GSTATS.mastery_total_qp(from_n) local gold = GSTATS.mastery_total_gold(to_n) - GSTATS.mastery_total_gold(from_n) local from_pct = GSTATS.mastery_pct(from_n) local to_pct = GSTATS.mastery_pct(to_n) local report = string.format( "@CMastery@c: @W[%d to %d] @c| Gold: @W%s @c| Qp: @W%s @c| Percentage: @W%s to %s@w", from_n, to_n, GSTATS.format_int(gold), GSTATS.format_int(qp), GSTATS.format_pct(from_pct), GSTATS.format_pct(to_pct) ) GSTATS.send_channel_report(report, channel) end
function GSTATS.report_instinct_costs(from_value, to_value, channel) local from_n, to_n_or_err = GSTATS.validate_cost_range("instinct", from_value, to_value) if not from_n then cecho(string.format("<tomato>gstats: %s\n", tostring(to_n_or_err))) return end local to_n = to_n_or_err local trains = GSTATS.instinct_total_trains(to_n) - GSTATS.instinct_total_trains(from_n) local gold = GSTATS.instinct_total_gold(to_n) - GSTATS.instinct_total_gold(from_n) local pups = math.ceil((tonumber(trains) or 0) / 5.3) local report = string.format( "@CInstinct@c: @W[%d to %d] @c| Gold: @W%s @c| Trains: @W%s @c(~%s pups needed)@w", from_n, to_n, GSTATS.format_int(gold), GSTATS.format_int(trains), GSTATS.format_int(pups) ) GSTATS.send_channel_report(report, channel) end
function GSTATS.handle_tell_report(teller, kind, from_value, to_value) local clean_kind = GSTATS.trim(kind):lower() local source, target = GSTATS.validate_cost_range(clean_kind, from_value, to_value) if not source then return end if clean_kind == "mastery" then local qp = GSTATS.mastery_total_qp(target) - GSTATS.mastery_total_qp(source) local gold = GSTATS.mastery_total_gold(target) - GSTATS.mastery_total_gold(source) local report = string.format( "@CMastery@c: @W[%d to %d] @c| Gold: @W%s @c| Qp: @W%s @c| Percentage: @W%s to %s@w", source, target, GSTATS.format_int(gold), GSTATS.format_int(qp), GSTATS.format_pct(GSTATS.mastery_pct(source)), GSTATS.format_pct(GSTATS.mastery_pct(target)) ) send("reply " .. report, false) return end local trains = GSTATS.instinct_total_trains(target) - GSTATS.instinct_total_trains(source) local gold = GSTATS.instinct_total_gold(target) - GSTATS.instinct_total_gold(source) local pups = math.ceil((tonumber(trains) or 0) / 5.3) local report = string.format( "@CInstinct@c: @W[%d to %d] @c| Gold: @W%s @c| Trains: @W%s @c(~%s pups needed)@w", source, target, GSTATS.format_int(gold), GSTATS.format_int(trains), GSTATS.format_int(pups) ) send("reply " .. report, false) end
function GSTATS.send_channel_report(report, channel) local target = GSTATS.resolve_report_channel(channel) if target == "" then cecho(string.format("<tomato>gstats: no report channel configured.\n")) return end send(target .. " " .. tostring(report or "") .. "@w", false) end
function GSTATS.report_stats(channel) local stats = GSTATS.from_gmcp() local parts = { GSTATS.report_segment("STR", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.str), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxstr)), GSTATS.report_segment("INT", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.int), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxint)), GSTATS.report_segment("WIS", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.wis), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxwis)), GSTATS.report_segment("DEX", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.dex), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxdex)), GSTATS.report_segment("CON", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.con), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxcon)), GSTATS.report_segment("LUK", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.luck), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxluck)), GSTATS.report_segment("HR", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.hitroll)), GSTATS.report_segment("DR", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.damroll)), GSTATS.report_segment("HP", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.hp), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxhp)), GSTATS.report_segment("MN", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.mana), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxmana)), GSTATS.report_segment("MV", GSTATS.safe_number(stats.moves), GSTATS.safe_number(stats.maxmoves)), } GSTATS.send_channel_report(table.concat(parts, " "), channel) end
function GSTATS.kill_capture_triggers(kind) local capture = GSTATS.capture[kind] if not capture or type(capture.triggers) ~= "table" then return end for _, trig in ipairs(capture.triggers) do if trig then pcall(killTrigger, trig) end end capture.triggers = {} end
function GSTATS.bump_capture_timer(kind, delay) local capture = GSTATS.capture[kind] if not capture then return end if capture.timer then pcall(killTimer, capture.timer) end capture.timer = tempTimer(delay or 0.2, function() if GSTATS["finish_" .. kind] then GSTATS["finish_" .. kind]() end end) end
function GSTATS.report_mastery(channel) GSTATS.capture.mastery = { channel = channel, rows = {}, triggers = {}, timer = nil } local pattern = "^(Bash|Pierce|Slash|Acid|Air|Cold|Disease|Earth|Electric|Energy|Fire|Holy|Light|Magic|Mental|Negative|Poison|Shadow|Sonic|Water)\\s+([0-9]+)\\s*[0-9]+\\s*[0-9,]+$" local trig = tempRegexTrigger(pattern, function() local name = matches[2] local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) or 0 GSTATS.capture.mastery.rows[name] = amount GSTATS.bump_capture_timer("mastery", 0.12) end) table.insert(GSTATS.capture.mastery.triggers, trig) send("mastery", false) end
function GSTATS.finish_mastery() local capture = GSTATS.capture.mastery if not capture then return end GSTATS.kill_capture_triggers("mastery") if capture.timer then pcall(killTimer, capture.timer) end local keys = {} for k, _ in pairs(capture.rows) do table.insert(keys, k) end table.sort(keys, function(a, b) return (capture.rows[a] or 0) > (capture.rows[b] or 0) end) local out = {} for _, k in ipairs(keys) do if (capture.rows[k] or 0) > 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment(k, capture.rows[k])) end end if #out == 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment("MASTERY", "none")) end GSTATS.send_channel_report(table.concat(out, " "), capture.channel) end
function GSTATS.report_instinct(channel) GSTATS.capture.instinct = { channel = channel, rows = {}, triggers = {}, timer = nil } local pattern = "^\\s*(?:Level\\s+\\d+\\s*:\\s*)?([A-Za-z][A-Za-z\\s\\-']*[A-Za-z])\\s+\\d+\\s+(?:[0-9]+%|N/A)\\s+([0-9]+)\\s+(?:[0-9,]+|N/A)\\s+(?:[0-9,]+|N/A)(?:\\s+.*)?$" local trig = tempRegexTrigger(pattern, function() local skill = GSTATS.trim(matches[2] or "") local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) or 0 if skill ~= "" then GSTATS.capture.instinct.rows[skill] = amount GSTATS.bump_capture_timer("instinct", 0.12) end end) table.insert(GSTATS.capture.instinct.triggers, trig) send("instinct", false) end
function GSTATS.finish_instinct() local capture = GSTATS.capture.instinct if not capture then return end GSTATS.kill_capture_triggers("instinct") if capture.timer then pcall(killTimer, capture.timer) end local keys = {} for k, _ in pairs(capture.rows) do table.insert(keys, k) end table.sort(keys, function(a, b) return (capture.rows[a] or 0) > (capture.rows[b] or 0) end) local out = {} for _, k in ipairs(keys) do if (capture.rows[k] or 0) > 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment(k, capture.rows[k])) end end if #out == 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment("INSTINCT", "none")) end GSTATS.send_channel_report(table.concat(out, " "), capture.channel) end
function GSTATS.report_resists(channel) GSTATS.capture.resists = { channel = channel, rows = {}, triggers = {}, timer = nil } local pattern = "^\\s*(Bash|Pierce|Slash|Acid|Air|Cold|Disease|Earth|Electric|Energy|Fire|Holy|Light|Magic|Mental|Negative|Poison|Shadow|Sonic|Water)\\s+[-+]?\\d+%\\s+\\d+\\s+[-+]?\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?%\\s+([-+]?\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?)%\\s*$" local trig = tempRegexTrigger(pattern, function() local damtype = GSTATS.trim(matches[2] or "") local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) or 0 if damtype ~= "" then GSTATS.capture.resists.rows[damtype] = amount GSTATS.bump_capture_timer("resists", 0.12) end end) table.insert(GSTATS.capture.resists.triggers, trig) send("resists", false) end
function GSTATS.finish_resists() local capture = GSTATS.capture.resists if not capture then return end GSTATS.kill_capture_triggers("resists") if capture.timer then pcall(killTimer, capture.timer) end local keys = {} for k, _ in pairs(capture.rows) do table.insert(keys, k) end table.sort(keys, function(a, b) return (capture.rows[a] or 0) > (capture.rows[b] or 0) end) local out = {} for _, k in ipairs(keys) do if (capture.rows[k] or 0) > 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment(k, capture.rows[k])) end end if #out == 0 then table.insert(out, GSTATS.report_segment("RESISTS", "none")) end GSTATS.send_channel_report(table.concat(out, " "), capture.channel) end
function GSTATS.help() cecho("\n<cyan>g_character commands\n") cecho(" <white>gstats help<grey> - show this help\n") cecho(" <white>gstats show|hide<grey> - toggle window visibility\n") cecho(" <white>gstats horizontal|vertical<grey> - set layout mode\n") cecho(" <white>gstats fontsize [size]<grey> - show/set font size\n") cecho(" <white>gstats compact on|off<grey> - compact labels mode\n") cecho(" <white>gstats stats [channel]<grey> - report core stats to channel\n") cecho(" <white>gstats mastery [channel]<grey> - report non-zero mastery values\n") cecho(" <white>gstats instinct [channel]<grey> - report non-zero instinct values\n") cecho(" <white>gstats resists [channel]<grey> - report positive resist values\n") cecho(" <white>gstats costs mastery <from> <to> [channel]<grey> - report mastery costs\n") cecho(" <white>gstats costs instinct <from> <to> [channel]<grey> - report instinct costs\n") cecho(" <white>gstats reset<grey> - reset defaults\n") end
function GSTATS.command(arg) GSTATS.ensure_ui() local cmd = (arg or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if cmd == "" then return GSTATS.help() end
local costs_cmd, report_kind, report_from, report_to, report_channel = cmd:match("^(%a+)%s+(%a+)%s+(%d+)%s+(%d+)%s*(%S*)%s*$") if costs_cmd == "costs" and (report_kind == "mastery" or report_kind == "instinct") then local channel = GSTATS.trim(report_channel) if channel == "" then channel = "echo" end if report_kind == "mastery" then GSTATS.report_mastery_costs(report_from, report_to, channel) else GSTATS.report_instinct_costs(report_from, report_to, channel) end return end
local report_type, report_channel = cmd:match("^(%S+)%s*(.-)%s*$") if report_type == "stats" or report_type == "mastery" or report_type == "instinct" or report_type == "resists" then if report_type == "stats" then GSTATS.report_stats(report_channel) elseif report_type == "mastery" then GSTATS.report_mastery(report_channel) elseif report_type == "instinct" then GSTATS.report_instinct(report_channel) else GSTATS.report_resists(report_channel) end return end
if cmd == "show" then GSTATS.state.visible = true GSTATS.ensure_ui() GSTATS.ui.container:show() return GSTATS.save_state() elseif cmd == "hide" then GSTATS.state.visible = false GSTATS.ensure_ui() GSTATS.ui.container:hide() return GSTATS.save_state() elseif cmd == "reset" then GSTATS.state = {} GSTATS.merge_defaults() if GSTATS.ui and GSTATS.ui.container then GSTATS.ui.container:move(GSTATS.state.x, GSTATS.state.y) GSTATS.ui.container:resize(GSTATS.state.width, GSTATS.state.height) end if GSTATS.last then GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end return GSTATS.save_state() elseif cmd == "vertical" or cmd == "horizontal" then GSTATS.state.layout = cmd if GSTATS.last then GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end GSTATS.save_state() cecho(string.format("<cyan>gstats layout set to: <white>%s\n", cmd)) return elseif cmd == "compact on" or cmd == "compact off" then GSTATS.state.compact = (cmd == "compact on") if GSTATS.last then GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end GSTATS.save_state() cecho(string.format("<cyan>gstats compact is now: <white>%s\n", GSTATS.state.compact and "on" or "off")) return elseif cmd == "compact" then cecho("<cyan>Usage: <white>gstats compact on|off\n") cecho(string.format("<cyan>Current compact mode: <white>%s\n", GSTATS.state.compact and "on" or "off")) return end
local font = tonumber(cmd:match("^fontsize%s+(%d+)$")) or tonumber(cmd:match("^font%s+(%d+)$")) if font then GSTATS.state.fontsize = font GSTATS.ui.console:setFontSize(font) if GSTATS.last then GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end GSTATS.save_state() cecho(string.format("<cyan>gstats font size set to: <white>%d\n", font)) return end
if cmd == "fontsize" or cmd == "font" then local current = tonumber(GSTATS.state.fontsize) or 9 cecho(string.format("<cyan>Current gstats font size: <white>%d\n", current)) return end
GSTATS.help() end
function GSTATS.command_compact(arg) GSTATS.ensure_ui() local cmd = (arg or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$"):lower() if cmd == "compact on" then GSTATS.state.compact = true elseif cmd == "compact off" then GSTATS.state.compact = false else cecho("<cyan>Usage: <white>gcom compact on|off\n") cecho(string.format("<cyan>Current compact mode: <white>%s\n", GSTATS.state.compact and "on" or "off")) return end if GSTATS.last then GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() end GSTATS.save_state() cecho(string.format("<cyan>gcom compact is now: <white>%s\n", GSTATS.state.compact and "on" or "off")) end
if not GSTATS.initialized then GSTATS.initialized = true GSTATS.load_state() GSTATS.ensure_ui() GSTATS.render_from_gmcp() registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.base", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.status", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.vitals", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.maxstats", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.stats", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.char.worth", "GSTATS.on_gmcp") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "GSTATS.save_state") GSTATS.install_tell_costs_trigger() end
